notes:
Nhà means house or home — the place where you live. It can refer to the building or the idea of “home” as a personal space.

It’s a noun. Use classifiers like căn or ngôi when counting (một căn nhà, hai ngôi nhà).  

You can also use nhà + person to mean “someone’s house” (nhà Minh = Minh’s house).  

Very commonly, nhà also means “my/our home” depending on context (về nhà = go home).  

Related word: gia đình = family (not the building, but the people).

definitions.vi: Nơi để ở, xây dựng làm chỗ sinh sống cho con người.
definitions.en: A building where people live; a home or house.

example.en: I am at home with my family.
example.vi: Tôi đang ở nhà với gia đình.

exampleSentences: Chiều nay em về nhà sớm để ăn cơm với gia đình.
Anh có muốn ghé qua nhà bạn Minh chơi vào cuối tuần này không?
Chị thường dọn dẹp nhà vào mỗi sáng thứ bảy.
notes_md:
**Nhà** means *house* or *home* — the place where you live. It can refer to the building or the idea of “home” as a personal space.

It’s a noun. Use classifiers like **căn** or **ngôi** when counting (một căn nhà, hai ngôi nhà).  

You can also use **nhà + person** to mean “someone’s house” (nhà Minh = Minh’s house).  

Very commonly, **nhà** also means “my/our home” depending on context (về nhà = go home).  

Related word: **gia đình** = family (not the building, but the people).
exampleSentencesTranslated: This afternoon I will return to the house early to have dinner with my family.
Do you want to stop by Minh's house to hang out this weekend?
She usually cleans the house every Saturday morning.
